title: Willic family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Willic family''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] family originally from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], but which by the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had migrated to [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]. Members included [[Korval Willic]] and his grandson, [[Vune Willic|Vune]].

==Family tree==
 [[Korval Willic]]--+--Unknown [[Gender/Legends|female]]
                |
         [[Vune Willic's father|Unknown Willic]]--+--[[Vune Willic's mother|Unknown female]]
                         |
                    [[Vune Willic]]
